user_system_path: Fix resolveAnyUser impersonation backdoor, card/resolver state mismatch, and dismiss semantics. Priority order F-auth -> F-card -> F-dismiss.
allowed_files_raw: lib/auth/**, lib/workday-presence/**, app/api/workday-presence/**, app/api/slack/**, lib/slack/**, and control-plane files
forbidden_files_raw: No schema, no UI, no e2e tests, no dependency changes.
required_local_proof: npx vitest run lib/auth/ lib/workday-presence/ app/api/workday-presence/ lib/slack/ app/api/slack/ && npm run build && npm run gate:continuity
acceptance_condition: resolveAnyUser impersonation path is gated behind non-prod env or removed from prod routes (F-auth); the Right Now card never states 'Draft ready' when command-state-resolver independently verdicts CLEAR (F-card); dismiss behavior matches its recorded interaction history (F-dismiss).
stop_condition: Stop when issue #354 has a merged PR with gate + build + vitest proof, addressing findings in priority order.
next_command: Fix F-auth first with red->green proof, prove with tests, push, and open PR.
